pi_items.source: Task setup scripts and downloaded OpenToonz sample repository (https://github.com/opentoonz/opentoonz_sample).
Task setup script explicitly creates and targets this directory.
Task description explicitly instructs offsetting the timing by 4 frames.
Task description requests 'approximately 50%' opacity, which falls properly within the [0.3, 0.7] range.
Verifier script logic requires new_files >= min_files. The downloaded dwanko_run.tnz file has 72 frames, making a 10-file minimum valid.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real 'dwanko_run.tnz' animation sample from the official OpenToonz repository, which contains 72 frames. The objective is to create a visual echo effect by duplicating the character column, offsetting its timing by exactly 4 frames, and reducing its opacity to approximately 50% (between 0.3 and 0.7). The agent must render the modified scene as PNG frames to the '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/echo_effect' directory, generating at least 10 valid output files.
